headline: Kirkwood Pulse • April 23, 2026
overview: The Cardinals defeated the Marlins 5-3 with strong performances from lefthanded hitters and starter Dustin May, who allowed only one run over 5 1/3 innings. This win highlights the Cardinals' effective offense and pitching as they continue their road trip, with Kyle Leahy starting the next game.

items.title: Tuesday’s Game Report: Cardinals 5, Marlins 3
items.excerpt: Nathan Church hit a two-run homer and the Cardinals' lefthanded batters had a big night in leading the team over the Marlins in Miami. [...]The post Tuesday’s Game Report: Cardinals 5, Marlins 3 appeared first on News from Rob Rains,…
